projects: Google Solution Challenge – Cropify App Developer (Flutter, Dart, Firebase): Collaborated with a team to build Cropify, an agri-based mobile app using Flutter, Dart, and Firebase. Developed clean UI screens and implemented real-time database and authentication features. Focused on solving real-world problems with mobile-first, scalable solutions.

Engineering Exploration Projects – MGM University: Built a soldering pen and a touchless water dispenser tap as part of hands-on engineering coursework. Worked with Arduino Uno, LM35 temperature sensor, IR sensor, 16x2 LCD, and basic PCB wiring. Gained hands-on experience in circuit design, sensor integration, and microcontroller programming.

Password Saver & YouTube Clone: Built a basic password manager and a YouTube UI clone during full-stack web development learning. Used HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and explored Node.js for backend functionality.

AI Face Classifier – Deep Learning Project (Python, PyTorch, OpenCV): Built a face image classifier to distinguish between real and AI-generated faces using transfer learning on ResNet-18. Preprocessed a custom dataset using PyTorch DataLoader with resizing, flipping, and normalization. Trained the model with cross-entropy loss and Adam optimizer. Deployed model for batch inference and tested on unseen data using OpenCV.

education.institution: Institute of Information and Communication Technology (IICT), MGM University
